title: Passenger Types Carried
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MissionAccepted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND Name LIKE 'Mission_Passenger%' AND PassengerType IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT PassengerType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MissionAccepted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND Name LIKE 'Mission_Passenger%' AND PassengerType IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PassengerType ORDER BY value DESC
